title: dactylorhiza hatagirea
intro: Dactylorhiza hatagirea, also known as the Himalayan orchid or Kail, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayan region. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani systems, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza hatagirea include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its role in reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Dactylorhiza hatagirea is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies and tonics.
